etymology.description: 隹(隹) (zhuī, "bird") + 弓(弓) (gōng, "bow") = bow aiming at bird -> outstanding
etymology.interpretation: The character combines 隹(隹) (zhuī, "bird") and 弓(弓) (gōng, "bow"), symbolizing the precision and skill required to hit a bird with an arrow, metaphorically implying excellence or outstanding ability.
etymology.simplification: 隽 is a simplified variant of 雋, retaining the phonetic element and dropping the bow radical for simplification.

examples.chinese: 他的文笔非常隽永(他的文筆非常隽永)。
这幅画的色彩非常隽美(這幅畫的色彩非常隽美)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè fú huà de sècǎi fēicháng juànměi.
examples.english: The colors of this painting are very outstanding.

examples.chinese: 在众多作品中，这部小说尤为隽秀(在眾多作品中，這部小說尤為隽秀)。
examples.pinyin: Zài zhòngduō zuòpǐn zhōng, zhè bù xiǎoshuō yóuwéi juànxiù.
examples.english: Among many works, this novel is particularly outstanding.
